authority_note: Per-TASK independent verification (D-001 amendment 3, Section 2). One directive may govern several tasks, each with its own allowed paths, git-canonical content identity, evidence, and independent verifier. accept() reads the (directive_id, task_id) entry as BLOCKING EVIDENCE: an in-regime task is refused unless every requirement APPLICABLE TO IT is PASS at the reviewed identity by an independent verifier (verifier != producer, per task). Missing/duplicate/extra/stale/cross-task rows fail closed. Acceptance authority stays in tools/project_control.py. Rows are 'pending' until the independent re-gate at the frozen review identity records PASS.
